title: Ragoon VI

'''Ragoon VI''', or '''Ragoon-6''', was a beautiful [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] untouched by civilization and therefore pollution. Ragoon gave off a blue glow from [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and was surrounded by several [[Star/Legends|stars]].

A younger [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] went to Ragoon VI with his friend [[Tahl]].

Years later, just after the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]], Jinn and his [[Padawan/Legends|padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were accompanied to Ragoon VI by Master [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme's]] padawan, [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], to complete a survival-training mission. The boys—nearly drowned by a vortex of churning waters—were rescued by Jinn, who called upon [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to lift them from the whirlpool.

[[File:The_Trail_of_the_Jedi_JP_cover_JQ2.jpg|thumb|left|
Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi on Ragoon VI]]In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], Jedi pilot [[Wren Honoran]] took Kenobi and his padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to the planet for a tracking exercise (since their last [[mission to Radnor]], Kenobi had grown a beard). Here they met the brother-and-sister [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] team [[Floria]] and [[Dane (bounty hunter)|Dane]]. Four other bounty hunters were there also—[[Teleq]], [[Mol Arcasite]], [[Hunti Pereg]], and an unknown hunter. It was here that Kenobi and Skywalker first met [[Force void/Legends|Void in the Force]] [[Granta Omega]], with whom they would tangle in the years to come.

The Jedi duo would, years later, meet Floria and Dane on the world of [[Null/Legends|Null]], posing as [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]] for the leader of [[Delaluna]], [[Samish Kash]], with whom Floria would fall in love.
